title: hoffmannia regalis
intro: Hoffmannia regalis, also known as the royal hoffmannia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a tropical plant native to Central America, particularly in countries such as Mexico and Costa Rica. Hoffmannia regalis has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been found to help alleviate various health issues. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations are used to treat conditions such as fever, respiratory infections, and digestive issues.
